section_title: Evidence before the arbitral tribunal-Unless otherwise agreed by the parties-
content:
34. Evidence before the arbitral tribunal-Unless otherwise agreed by the parties-
(a) evidence may be given before the arbitral tribunal orally or in writing or by affidavit,
(b) the arbitral tribunal may administer an oath or affirmation to a witness subject to his
consent.

sub_sections.text: evidence may be given before the arbitral tribunal orally or in writing or by affidavit,

the arbitral tribunal may administer an oath or affirmation to a witness subject to his
consent.
